response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development; while they have broad full-stack experience and leadership in mentoring, their technical foundation does not align with the core cloud compute and C++-centric requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops
Active open-source contributor with infrastructure and tooling projects
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, not aligned with C++-centric infrastructure role
